findings.title: Outreach POST lacks class/student ownership check; attacker-controlled phone is persisted then trusted
findings.impact: wrong-parent call, free arbitrary-call gateway via SahayakAI Twilio account, PII leak
findings.fix: Read classes/{classId} verify teacherUid; read students/{studentId}; use stored parentPhone/parentLanguage; ignore body values

findings.title: Duplicate call-summary generation across transcript-sync + twiml-status webhooks, plus intra-webhook race
findings.impact: 2x Vertex Gemini cost per completed call; non-deterministic callSummary on race (last-write-wins)
findings.fix: Firestore transaction with callSummaryStatus='generating' sentinel before LLM call; applied to BOTH webhook paths

findings.title: No outreach dedup / cooldown
findings.impact: parent harassment, Twilio bill DoS; compounds with F9-001
findings.fix: 5-minute cooldown check against most recent parent_outreach doc for (teacherUid, studentId)

findings.title: saveAttendance computes todayStr in server UTC; IST teachers active 00:00-05:30 IST get false 'future date' rejection
findings.impact: early-morning IST attendance saves rejected as future-dated
findings.fix: Pin todayStr to IST (UTC+5:30) or accept clientTimezone parameter

findings.title: 7-day backfill window has no admin override
40-student cap enforced via count-then-write; TOCTOU race allows >40 on concurrent adds
findings.impact: cap exceeded by 1-2 in race; cosmetic

findings.title: transcript-sync trusts client-supplied turnCount; no equality check vs transcript.length
findings.impact: UI off-by-one if Pipecat miscounts; summary trigger uses array length so unaffected

verified_good: Class ownership checks on getClassAction/updateClassAction/deleteClassAction/getStudentsAction/saveAttendanceAction — playbook step 8 blocked
Middleware deletes incoming x-user-id and re-injects only after verifyIdToken — header spoof blocked
/api/attendance/call validates outreach.teacherUid and uses server-stored phone (necessary but bypassed via F9-001 upstream)
transcript-sync uses timingSafeEqual for internal key
